channel.title: Finance 新闻汇总 - Free News Agent
channel.description: Finance 分类的最新新闻汇总，由 Free News Agent 自动生成，Gemini AI 筛选优质内容。

item.title: US considers tying Nvidia and AMD AI chip exports to foreign investment pledges

item.title: Nvidia stops production of chips intended for China
item.description: <![CDATA[Nvidia stops production of chips intended for China]]>

item.title: Depleted oil reserve leaves US exposed as Iran war pushes up prices

item.title: Gulf states could review overseas investments to ease strains caused by Iran war
item.description: <![CDATA[Gulf states could review overseas investments to ease strains caused by Iran war]]>

item.title: Trade Desk’s stock soars, as a potential OpenAI partnership gives investors reason to cheer
